def HasLorentzType (T : (őĪ ‚Üí őĶ) ‚Üí (őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ'))

    eLorentzNorm (T f) q s őĹ ‚Č§ c * eLorentzNorm f p r őľ

import Mathlib

variable {őĪ' őĶ‚āĀ őĶ‚āā : Type*} {m : MeasurableSpace őĪ'} [TopologicalSpace őĶ‚āĀ] [ENorm őĶ‚āĀ]
    [TopologicalSpace őĶ‚āā] [ENorm őĶ‚āā] {f : őĪ ‚Üí őĶ} {f‚āĀ : őĪ ‚Üí őĶ‚āĀ}

/-- An operator has Lorentz type `(p, r, q, s)` if it is bounded as a map
from `L^{q, s}` to `L^{p, r}`. `HasLorentzType T p r q s őľ őĹ c` means that
`T` has Lorentz type `(p, r, q, s)` w.r.t. measures `őľ`, `őĹ` and constant `c`. -/
def HasLorentzType (T : (őĪ ‚Üí őĶ‚āĀ) ‚Üí (őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ‚āā))
    (p r q s : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (őľ : Measure őĪ) (őĹ : Measure őĪ') (c : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) : Prop :=
  ‚ąÄ f : őĪ ‚Üí őĶ‚āĀ, MemLorentz f p r őľ ‚Üí AEStronglyMeasurable (T f) őĹ ‚ąß
    eLorentzNorm (T f) q s őĹ ‚Č§ c * eLorentzNorm f p r őľ

  [TopologicalSpace őĶ‚āĀ] [ENormedAddMonoid őĶ‚āĀ] [TopologicalSpace őĶ‚āā] [ENormedAddMonoid őĶ‚āā]
  {T : (őĪ ‚Üí őĶ‚āĀ) ‚Üí (őĪ' ‚Üí őĶ‚āā)}
  {p q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě} {őľ : Measure őĪ} {őĹ : Measure őĪ'} {c : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě} :
    HasLorentzType T p q őľ őĹ c ‚ÜĒ HasStrongType T p q őľ őĹ c := by
  unfold HasLorentzType HasStrongType
  constructor
  ¬∑ intro h f hf

    have := h f hf

    have := h f hf
